message:
Fix double borrow by adding pool_and_links_mut accessor

TerminalWriter (terminal_writer.rs):
- Add pool_and_links_mut() method returning (&mut GraphemePool, &mut LinkRegistry)
- Allows borrowing both resources together without self-borrow conflicts

Program rendering (program.rs):
- Use pool_and_links_mut() to get both refs in single borrow
- Fixes borrow checker issue with separate pool_mut() and links_mut() calls
- Cleaner scope management for Frame lifetime

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
